label: ER-positive / luminal endocrine biology
basis: Luminal breast cancers with active ER signaling express ESR1/PGR/FOXA1/GATA3 and often differ therapeutically from basal/TNBC
suggested_assay: ER/PR/HER2 IHC; ESR1 mutation testing when endocrine-resistant
caveat: Expression supports active pathway state, not ESR1 mutation status by itself

label: Basal-like TNBC EGFR/KRT program
basis: Basal/TNBC breast cancers often show EGFR and basal keratin expression with low ER pathway markers
suggested_assay: ER/PR/HER2 IHC; DNA/RNA panel for actionable mutations
caveat: This indicates basal-like biology, not a single mutation; use as context for mutation/trial testing

label: AR-driven prostate program
basis: AR pathway activation is reflected by KLK3/KLK2/TMPRSS2/NKX3-1 expression
suggested_assay: AR-V7/AR alteration testing when clinically indicated
caveat: Expression reports pathway activity, not whether AR is amplified or mutated

label: Neuroendocrine prostate biology
basis: Treatment-emergent neuroendocrine prostate cancer is commonly linked to TP53/RB1 loss and shows neuroendocrine markers with reduced AR-output genes
suggested_assay: DNA panel for TP53/RB1/PTEN; pathology/IHC for NEPC
caveat: Expression supports NE transformation biology but cannot prove RB1/TP53 genotype alone

label: EGFR-addicted LUAD-like biology
basis: EGFR-mutant LUAD can show EGFR/ERBB3/FOXA1 lineage and receptor-axis expression
caveat: Low-specificity RNA context only; never substitute for EGFR genotyping

label: STK11/KEAP1 cold-metabolic LUAD biology
basis: STK11/KEAP1-altered LUAD often shows oxidative-stress/metabolic programs and immune-cold biology
suggested_assay: DNA panel for STK11/KEAP1; immune-context review
caveat: Low-specificity expression support; metabolic stress and lineage can mimic this

label: MSI-H immune-inflamed colorectal biology
basis: MSI-H/dMMR colorectal cancers often show interferon/T-cell inflamed expression programs
caveat: Inflamed RNA can reflect microenvironment or treatment state; confirm MSI/MMR directly

label: TGF-beta/stromal colorectal biology
basis: CMS4-like colorectal tumors show mesenchymal/TGF-beta and stromal programs associated with poorer prognosis and therapy resistance
suggested_assay: Transcriptomic subtype or pathology review; DNA panel as indicated
caveat: Bulk expression can be driven by stroma; use tumor attribution and decomposition before interpreting as tumor-cell-intrinsic

label: HCC WNT/beta-catenin biology
basis: CTNNB1-mutant HCC often shows WNT/beta-catenin target expression such as GLUL and AXIN2
suggested_assay: DNA panel for CTNNB1; HCC pathology review
caveat: Expression suggests pathway activity, not the exact mutation; liver background can confound

label: AFP/progenitor HCC biology
basis: AFP/GPC3/KRT19/EPCAM expression marks progenitor-like/aggressive HCC biology and can affect trial/target discussions
suggested_assay: AFP serum/IHC; pathology review; DNA/RNA panel
caveat: This is an expression-defined biology axis, not a single mutation

label: Mesenchymal GBM biology
basis: Mesenchymal GBM is often associated with NF1 alteration and inflammatory/ECM programs
suggested_assay: DNA panel for NF1/PTEN/EGFR; methylation/subtype review
caveat: Macrophage/stromal admixture can mimic mesenchymal expression; use cell-state/decomposition context

label: Melanocytic MAPK-lineage biology
basis: Melanocytic melanoma states often retain MITF/MLANA/PMEL/TYR; BRAF/NRAS/NF1 still require genotyping
caveat: Lineage expression does not identify the MAPK driver mutation

label: Dedifferentiated/AXL-high melanoma biology
basis: AXL/NGFR-high MITF-low melanoma states are linked to de-differentiation and MAPK inhibitor resistance programs
suggested_assay: BRAF/NRAS/NF1/KIT DNA testing; therapy history review
caveat: Expression indicates state/resistance biology, not a specific mutation

label: hypermutation immune-hot (POLE/MSI)
basis: POLE-ultramutated / MSI-H tumors in these lineages show strong interferon/T-cell-inflamed programs; scoped to POLE/MSI-prone lineages (KIRC excluded as intrinsically inflamed) and intended for WITHIN-LINEAGE-RELATIVE per-sample scoring vs the lineage baseline (trufflepig)
suggested_assay: POLE/exonuclease sequencing; MSI PCR/NGS; MMR IHC; TMB
caveat: Degenerate by RNA: POLE vs MSI vs microenvironment-inflamed are not separable by expression - confirm hypermutation by DNA; absolute immune-hot over-calls (use within-lineage-relative)
